complete_requires: all native roles licensed by Vocabulary Semantics Baseline 1.0
no undeclared or unrestricted hidden metalanguage
behavioral verifier passes for the full bounded state space
mutation suite detects every registered semantic mutation
partial_when: some commitments are represented but at least one required commitment is unsupported or unresolved
behavior is preserved only under an additional undeclared semantic assumption
trace or output preservation is incomplete
unsupported_when: a required commitment cannot be licensed under the frozen semantics baseline
completion would require an unrestricted payload language or arbitrary code
the compiler can only pass by changing the frozen scenario or ambiguity policy
error_when: the implementation crashes or produces invalid artifacts before a scientific outcome can be assigned

behavioral_failure.report: shortest counterexample and failed commitment classes

vocabulary_level_claim.existential: at least one independently regenerated complete candidate
vocabulary_level_claim.reproducible: three independently regenerated complete candidates with identical canonical outputs and source digests

comparison_rule: No superiority or ranking conclusion is permitted in CRE-002.
